creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
On Sat, 16 Oct 2010 14:13:40 +0300, Marius Strobl  
<marius@alchemy.franken.de> wrote:

> It's unclear why you build environment needs this but anyway, the
> proposed patch will break some other things as overriding the
> do-build target with just issuing ./Gmake will no longer set up
> the content of MAKE_ENV as environment for gmake, amongst others.
> Could you please try whether the attached patch has the same effect
> for you?
>
> Marius
>

I tried that myself... and it failed... I will try again..
Yup, if failed....

What it really looks like is that there isn't -I${PREFIX}/include passed  
to compiler

here's better log, that I provided at fist (this one is created with  
script)
http://files.bsdroot.lv/log/cdrtools.build.log (this on is for your patch)
